case_title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. LOI CAM TRUONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF XIAO ZHEN WU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER HSIN JU CHANG #301206. DEFENDANT LOI CAM TRUONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MY NGUYEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOI CAM TRUONG SUBMITTED AN AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (SC-109) INDICATING HE IS THE HUSBAND OF MY NGUYEN. AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY IT WAS DISCOVERED THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS PART OF AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION 658194 THAT HAS JUDGMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED JUN-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, LOI CAM

ORDER GIVEN BY THE HON. JAMES A. ROBERTSON IN CASE CSM-18-859723: XIAO ZHEN WU IS DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP 391(B)(2). XIAO ZHEN WU HAS REPEATEDLY LITIGATED OR ATTEMPTED TO LITIGATE THE SAME CLAIM - SEE CASES CSM*18-858445 AND CSM=18-859723..

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIAO ZHEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED JUN-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, MY
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,309.34 FILED BY WU, XIAO ZHEN AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, LOI CAM NGUYEN, MY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SC-105 - REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE REQUEST **FILE LESS THAN THE REQUIRED TEN(10)DAYS NEEDED FOR ANSWER -TWO(2)COURT DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING** FILER TOLD AT WINDOW. DOCUMENT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 TO BE JOINED WITH DOCKET FOR JUNE 26TH HEARING. FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUONG, LOI CAM
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY WU, XIAO ZHEN TRUONG, LOI CAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUONG, LOI CAM
